---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, agent, template, or repository improvement
---

## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Motivation

What problem would this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the change you want to see.

## Possible scope

- docs only
- config only
- new skill
- agent update
- template update
- workflow change
- other

## Alternatives considered

List any alternatives you considered.

## Additional context

Add examples, links, or references if helpful.
